meaning: adj.用于养肥禽畜的,正被养肥的
examples: Some foods are more fattening than others.
This stuff is not just fattening.
Herds are fattening on the clover of early spring.
Local customers, by comparison, end up paying more per mile, thereby fattening profit margins.
It's a "fat farm" in the truest sense--but too much fattening can hurt the taste.
